evals.prompt: PR #87 がでかすぎてレビュー通らない。feat/user-management ブランチで、DB マイグレーション、ユーザー CRUD API、管理画面 UI、テスト全部入りで 800 行超えてる。stacked PR に分けてほしい。
evals.expected_output: Should run Phase 1 (analyze diff, logical split, mechanical ordering, validate against pr-granularity.md) then Phase 2 (create branches and draft PRs). Should identify 3-4 logical groups (migration → API → UI → tests), present split plan, wait for approval, create branches and draft PRs. Should hand off to stacked-pr for maintenance.

assertions.name: phase1-diff-analysis
assertions.check: Phase 1: Analyzes the full diff before proposing a split

assertions.name: phase1-logical-grouping
assertions.check: Phase 1: Groups changes by logical responsibility

assertions.name: phase1-dependency-ordering
assertions.check: Phase 1: Orders PRs by technical dependency (schema before API before UI)

assertions.name: phase1-granularity-validation
assertions.check: Phase 1: Validates split against pr-granularity.md guidelines

assertions.name: phase2-approval-before-execution
assertions.check: Phase 2: Waits for user approval before creating branches

assertions.name: phase2-draft-pr-creation
assertions.check: Phase 2: Creates draft PRs with correct stacked base branch targeting

assertions.name: phase2-prepare-issue-pr
assertions.check: Phase 2: Uses prepare-issue-pr skill for PR title/body drafting

assertions.name: handoff-to-stacked-pr
assertions.check: Reports result and mentions stacked-pr skill for ongoing maintenance

evals.prompt: ローカルで PoC 書いてたら feat/new-search ブランチが膨らんじゃった。まだ PR にしてないんだけど、Elasticsearch 連携、検索 API、フロントの検索コンポーネント、あと既存の DB クエリからの移行ロジックが全部入ってる。これ分割して stacked PR にしたい。
evals.expected_output: Should handle a local-only branch (no existing PR). Phase 1 analyzes diff against default branch, identifies logical groups, considers ES migration coexistence. Phase 2 creates branches and draft PRs after approval.

assertions.name: local-branch-handling
assertions.check: Phase 1: Correctly handles a branch with no existing PR (diffs against default branch)

assertions.name: migration-awareness
assertions.check: Phase 1: Considers the migration/coexistence aspect of replacing DB queries with ES

assertions.name: phase2-branch-creation
assertions.check: Phase 2: Creates properly named branches derived from the original branch name

assertions.name: phase2-stacked-bases
assertions.check: Phase 2: Each draft PR targets its parent branch, not main (except the first)

evals.prompt: この PR 分割する必要あるかな？feat/add-logging ブランチで、ロギングライブラリの追加と既存の3ファイルに log 文を追加しただけ。diff は 120 行くらい。
evals.expected_output: Should run Phase 1 only. Analyzes the diff, validates against pr-granularity.md sizing heuristics, and concludes the PR is reasonably sized. Phase 2 is not needed.

assertions.name: no-unnecessary-split
assertions.check: Phase 1: Correctly identifies the PR doesn't need splitting

assertions.name: granularity-reference
assertions.check: Phase 1: References pr-granularity.md heuristics to justify the decision

assertions.name: no-phase2
assertions.check: Phase 2 is not triggered since no split is needed

evals.prompt: plan-stacked-pr から呼ばれてる。新しい通知機能の大枠はこう: メール/Slack/Webhook の3チャネル、通知テンプレート管理、ユーザーごとの通知設定、送信キュー。これらの分割粒度を決めてほしい。コードはまだない。
evals.expected_output: Should run Phase 1 only (no code to split, invoked for analysis). Should produce a structured split plan based on the feature description, applying logical split and mechanical ordering. Should NOT attempt Phase 2 since there is no code.

assertions.name: phase1-only
assertions.check: Only Phase 1 runs — no attempt to create branches or PRs

assertions.name: feature-description-based
assertions.check: Determines split based on feature description, not code diff

assertions.name: structured-output
assertions.check: Produces structured split plan with scope, order, and rationale for each PR

assertions.name: dependency-awareness
assertions.check: Correctly identifies dependencies (e.g., template management before channel implementations)
